description: Single configuration record for the Salis Fleet Management module.

fields.description: Default company applied to Salis transactions when not set explicitly.
fields.label: Default Company

fields.description: Default cost center used for fleet cost postings.
fields.label: Default Cost Center

fields.description: Number of days before an expiry or due date to start raising alerts.
fields.label: Alert Lead Days

fields.description: Number of days without a dispatch trip before an Active vehicle is flagged as idle.
fields.label: Idle Vehicle Days

fields.description: Number of days a Fuel Request may stay Pending before it is flagged as overdue.
fields.label: Fuel Request Pending Max Days

fields.description: Master switch to enable approval routing across Salis transactions.
fields.label: Enable Approvals

fields.description: Require approval when an assignment or transfer crosses project boundaries.
fields.label: Cross-Project Needs Approval

fields.description: Block vehicle assignment when the linked vehicle has expired compliance.
fields.label: Block Assignment On Expired Compliance

fields.description: Fuel requests above this litre amount require approval.
fields.label: Fuel Request Approval Threshold (Litres)

fields.description: Fuel requests at or above this litre amount require Regional-tier authority.
fields.label: Fuel Regional Tier Threshold (Litres)

fields.description: Fuel requests at or above this litre amount require Operations-tier authority.
fields.label: Fuel Operations Tier Threshold (Litres)

fields.description: Passenger counts above this number require Operations-tier authority.
fields.label: Passenger Count Operations Threshold

fields.description: Vehicle Damage Write-Off cases at or above this estimated cost (SAR) require Operations-tier authority; lower-value cases require at least Regional-tier.
fields.label: Write-Off Operations Threshold (SAR)

fields.description: Movement Cost Recovery amounts at or above this value (SAR) require Operations-tier authority; lower amounts require at least Regional-tier.
fields.label: Cost Recovery Operations Threshold (SAR)

fields.description: Configurable Delegation-of-Authority ladder: map each tier to a native Frappe Role. When populated, these rows extend the built-in tier-to-role mapping so the DoA ladder can be tuned without a code change.
fields.label: Authority Tier Map

fields.description: Allow drivers to access the self-service portal.
fields.label: Enable Driver Portal

name: Salis Settings
